message:
bd-2utc3: fix ShardGuard lock requirements for cross-table operations

- Upgrade for_cancel from B→A to B→A→C: cancel_request calls
  advance_region_state which can trigger handle_obligation_leaks
  in the Finalizing branch, requiring obligation table access.

- Add for_obligation_resolve (B→A→C): commit/abort/mark_leaked
  obligation methods call advance_region_state, which in the
  Finalizing branch checks task terminal status (needs A) and
  handles obligation leaks (needs C). The existing for_obligation
  (B→C) is correct for create_obligation only.

- Update for_obligation docs to clarify it covers creation only.

- Add module-level RuntimeState method → ShardGuard mapping table
  documenting which guard each operation requires.

- Add tests for new for_obligation_resolve guard variant.
- Update for_cancel tests to reflect B→A→C lock set.
- Add for_obligation_resolve to concurrent mixed guards test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
